title: Adding an extra LoRA/upscale folder never reloads ComfyUI paths → 400 on gen
description: 400 'Prompt outputs failed validation' when a LoRA is selected on Chroma (also LTX/WAN). ROOT CAUSE (corrected — NOT the reload theory in brief.md): the LoRA-object injector regex in comfyController.js only matched bare keys (^Lora_...), but the MPI-127 alias pass emits Input_Lora_1..6 and flat/staged workflows title their nodes Input_Lora_*. The aliased key fell to the generic _inject, which wrote the whole {lora_name,strength_model,strength_clip} OBJECT into node.inputs.lora_name -> ComfyUI 'Value not in list: lora_name: {dict}' + cascade strength_model=None FLOAT crash. FIX: regex now ^(?:Input_)?Lora_... (1 line). Also fixes WAN (nodes titled Input_Lora_High/Low_*). NOT a folder/yaml/reload bug — restart never fixed it because injection was structurally broken. Guard test: tests/lora-injection-routing.test.cjs.
